summary: REQ-42 appears partially implemented by expanding SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES in frontend/src/constants/languages.ts and retaining the 'none' option, but the diff is truncated so completeness and getBrowserDefaultLanguage() behavior cannot be verified. REQ-43 (perfect alphabetical ordering everywhere languages are shown) is not evidenced in the two specified UI components; only a hook-level combined sorting change is shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: getBrowserDefaultLanguage() continues to return a supported base language code when possible, otherwise falls back to 'en'.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff for frontend/src/constants/languages.ts is truncated and does not show getBrowserDefaultLanguage() or any updates confirming the required fallback/normalization behavior.

missing_requirements.requirement: Both FloatingLanguageSelector and LanguageMultiSelectDropdown render the combined built-in + custom language list in strictly alphabetical order by English label (case-insensitive), staying sorted after adding a custom language and after reload.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes are shown for frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingLanguageSelector.tsx or frontend/src/components/language/LanguageMultiSelectDropdown.tsx, so there is no evidence that these components use the new sorted combined list or apply case-insensitive label sorting in their rendered checklist.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (does not show modifications for FloatingLanguageSelector.tsx or LanguageMultiSelectDropdown.tsx)
